notes: Repo's %report macro (weighted PROC FREQ with outpct for crude/modeled HTN prevalence, PROC SUMMARY with CV, and the closed-form SE = 100*sqrt(p(1-p)/n)). Only the input line changed: 'set weights.&ext' (a P: libname) now reads a WORK dataset of the same shape (aa_seq rakewgt zip state state_fips pph htnyn htnc). Synthetic 20-row weights extract + small state_fips crosswalk substituted for the sensitive source; the trailing PROC EXPORT to a P: path is outside the macro and omitted.
